name: v0.1 fallback: level=2 routes to repair.specificity when no new trigger fires
description: Regression/parity fixture: when escalation level is already 2 and no new trigger (any-hit-3 or incTwoCycles) fires this cycle, the v0.1 fallback logic should choose repair.specificity (not vent.partial_vent).

notes: Sum stays stable at 2 (no incTwoCycles, no any-hit-3).
In repair mode (level=2), action should be repair.specificity.
This demonstrates that the level=2 branch is reachable without requiring a new escalation trigger in the same cycle.
